description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.4 Docker image, caching vendor/ruby, with a before_script that runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -yqq nodejs libpq-dev, then gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, and finally bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor. Define a rails job (default test stage) that uses the postgres:alpine service, sets variables DATABASE_URL=postgres://${POSTGRES_USER}:${POSTGRES_PASSSWORD}@postgres/${POSTGRES_DB}, POSTGRES_DB=test, POSTGRES_PASSSWORD=test-password, POSTGRES_USER=test, RAILS_ENV=test, and executes rails db:migrate, rails db:seed, and rails test. The pipeline should rely on the vendor/ruby cache and does not declare custom stages.
